The '''''Rim Merchant Einem''''' was a [[Trade Federation cargo hauler]] in the [[Trade Defense Force]].

==History==
The vessel served under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mignay]].<ref name="RP" /> After the failed [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] by the Federation, it was one of the ships transferred to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]], where it served as [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] at the [[Second Battle of Zonama Sekot]]. The ship was damaged in the battle, when it was rammed accidentally by two escorting [[Light cruiser/Legends|CEC light cruisers]].<ref name="RP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1st|in book}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
